message.content:
Process the screens files from the to-delete.md file. The file lists unused code that needs to be fixed.

Files to process:
1. src/screens/AirlineMilesMarketplace/Models/index.ts - Line 9: `AirlineMilesMarketplaceParams`, Line 21: `event`
2. src/screens/ExtractRewardProgram/Models/index.ts - Lines 19,64,66,69,72-73: various parameters
3. src/screens/ExtractRewardProgram/index.ts - Line 23: `getPlaceholder`
4. src/screens/InvoiceCashbackOnboarding/index.tsx - Line 26: `setRefresh`, Lines 84: `pts`, `price`
5. src/screens/InvoiceCashbackOnboarding/models/index.ts - Line 29: `InvoiceCashbackRouteProp`
6. src/screens/InvoiceCashbackPoints/index.tsx - Line 10: `CashbackInvoiceItem`
7. src/screens/InvoiceCashbackPoints/models/index.ts - Lines 15,22,37: parameters/types
8. src/screens/InvoiceCashbackSummary/models/index.ts - Lines 10,40: parameters/types
9. src/screens/InvoiceCashbackSummary/view.tsx - Line 13: `Dimensions`
10. src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/index.tsx - Line 34: `filtersPeriod`
11. src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/models/index.ts - Line 40: `iso`
12. src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/view.tsx - Line 2: `Dimensions`
13. src/screens/Points/Models/index.ts - Lines 34,39: parameters/types
14. src/screens/Points/data/index.ts - Line 62: `POINTS_OPTIONS`
15. src/screens/PointsDetail/Models/index.ts - Line 8: `PointsExtractProps`
16. src/screens/RewardProgramMarketplace/Models/index.ts - Line 18: `event`

Focus on:
1. Removing unused imports
2. Prefixing unused parameter names in type definitions with `_`
3. Removing unused type definitions that are truly not used

Please read each file and make the necessary edits.

file.content:
import {
  Box,
  Text,
  ListTextIcon,
  Button,
  Icon,
  BackDropBottom,
  Alert,
  Loading,
  SeparatorHorizontal,
} from '@semparar/design-system-app';
import { FC } from 'react';
import { Dimensions } from 'react-native';

import BasicScreen from '../../atomic/templates/BasicScreen';
import { InvoiceCashbackViewProps } from './models';
import React from 'react';

const InvoiceCashbackSummaryView: FC<InvoiceCashbackViewProps> = ({
  handleGoBack,
  onConfirmRescue,
  onExitResult,
  isRescueLoading,
  isRescueConcluded,
  isRescueFailed,
  items,
  effectiveShowResult,
  onOpenDefault,
  modalizeRef1,
  formattedSelectedPoints,
  formattedSelectedReais,
  screenTitle,
  height,
}) => {
  return (
    <BasicScreen
      hasScroll
      hasHeader
      bgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_03"
      leftIconOnPress={handleGoBack}
      title={screenTitle}
      hasRightIcon={!effectiveShowResult}
      rightIcon="icon-help"
      rightIconOnPress={onOpenDefault}
      errorButtonOnPress={() => {}}
      isLoading={false}
    >
      {!effectiveShowResult ? (
        <>
          <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller" flex={1} justify="flex-start">
            <Text
              color="INTENSE_COLOR_05"
              testID="invoice-cashback-main-title"
              type="headingMDL"
              mt="smaller"
              mb="small"
            >
              Revise as informações para confirmar o cashback
            </Text>

            <Text
              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              type="paragraphMDM"
              colorBold="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              mb="nano"
            >
              Valor em pontos
            </Text>

            <Text
              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              type="paragraphL"
              colorBold="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              mt="nano"
              mb="xxs"
            >
              {formattedSelectedPoints}
            </Text>

            <SeparatorHorizontal
              mb="xxs"
              bgColor='BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02'
              height={1}
              width="100%"
            />

            <Text
              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              type="paragraphMDM"
              colorBold="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              mb="nano"
            >
              Valor em reais
            </Text>

            <Text
              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              type="paragraphL"
              colorBold="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              mt="nano"
              mb="xxs"
            >
              {formattedSelectedReais}
            </Text>

            <SeparatorHorizontal
              mb="xxs"
              bgColor='BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02'
              height={1}
              width="100%"
            />

            <Text
              align="left"
              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              type="paragraphMDM"
              colorBold="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              mb="nano"
            >
              Cashback em
            </Text>

            <Text
              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              type="paragraphL"
              colorBold="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              mt="nano"
              mb="xxs"
            >
              Até 72h
            </Text>

            <Alert
              label="O valor é aplicado e exibido nos lançamentos da sua fatura aberta."
              type="info"
              icon="icon-calendar"
            />
          </Box>

          <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller">
            <Button
              text="Confirmar desconto"
              mt="large"
              mb="small"
              onPress={onConfirmRescue}
              disabled={!!isRescueLoading}
              testID="invoice-cashback-button"
            />

            <Loading title="Aguarde..." visible={!!isRescueLoading} />
          </Box>
        </>
      ) : (
        <>
          {isRescueConcluded && !isRescueFailed && (
            <>
              <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller" flex={1} justify="center" align="center">
                <Box
                  bgColor="PLUS_COLOR_03"
                  borderColor="PLUS_COLOR_01"
                  borderRadiusBottomLeft="medium"
                  pd="innerMedium"
                  borderRadiusBottomRight="medium"
                  borderRadiusTopRight="medium"
                  borderRadiusTopLeft="medium"
                  borderBottomWidth="small"
                  borderTopWidth="small"
                  borderLeftWidth="small"
                  borderRightWidth="small"
                  mb="small"
                >
                  <Icon name="icon-check" color="PLUS_COLOR_01" size="sm" />
                </Box>

                <Text type="subtitleXXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="small">Cashback aplicado</Text>

                <Text align="center" type="paragraphLG" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03" mb="small">O valor será aplicado em até 72h na sua fatura aberta.</Text>
              </Box>

              <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller">
                <Button
                  text="Ir para o início"
                  mt="large"
                  mb="small"
                  onPress={onExitResult}
                  testID="invoice-cashback-result-success-button"
                />
              </Box>
            </>
          )}
          {!isRescueConcluded && isRescueFailed && (
            <>
              <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller" flex={1} justify="center" align="center">
                <Box
                  bgColor="DENY_COLOR_03"
                  borderColor="DENY_COLOR_01"
                  borderRadiusBottomLeft="medium"
                  pd="innerMedium"
                  borderRadiusBottomRight="medium"
                  borderRadiusTopRight="medium"
                  borderRadiusTopLeft="medium"
                  borderBottomWidth="small"
                  borderTopWidth="small"
                  borderLeftWidth="small"
                  borderRightWidth="small"
                  mb="small"
                >
                  <Icon name="icon-circle-alert" color="DENY_COLOR_01" size="sm" />
                </Box>

                <Text type="subtitleXXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="small">Algo deu errado!</Text>

                <Text type="paragraphLG" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03" mb="small">Por favor, tente mais tarde.</Text>
              </Box>

              <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller">
                <Button
                  text="Voltar"
                  mt="large"
                  mb="small"
                  onPress={onExitResult}
                  testID="invoice-cashback-result-failed-button"
                />
              </Box>
            </>
          )}
        </>
      )}

      <BackDropBottom modalHeight={height * 0.53} modalizeRef={modalizeRef1}>
        <Text type="subtitleXXL" mb="smaller" mt="smaller" align="center">
          Use seus pontos para pagar menos na fatura
        </Text>

        <ListTextIcon items={items} ml="nano" mr="nano" type="list" mb="smaller" />

        <Button text="Entendi" onPress={() => modalizeRef1.current?.close()} />
      </BackDropBottom>
    </BasicScreen>
  );
};

export default InvoiceCashbackSummaryView;

content.content:
1→export const KEY_NAME_TO_ICON = {
     2→  RESCUE_IN_INVOICE: 'resgate de cashback em fatura',
     3→  MARKETPLACE: 'marketplace',
     4→  FUEL_VOUCHER: 'voucher para abastecimento',
     5→  MONTHLY_DISCOUNT: 'desconto na mensalidade',
     6→  CAR_INSURANCE_DISCOUNT: 'desconto seguro auto',
     7→  PARKING_DISCOUNT: 'desconto em estacionamento',
     8→  FINES_DISCOUNT: 'desconto em multas e debitos',
     9→  IPVA_DISCOUNT: 'desconto ipva',
    10→  AIRLINE_MILES: 'milhas aereas',
    11→};
    12→
    13→export const NAME_TO_ICON: Record<string, string> = {
    14→  [KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.RESCUE_IN_INVOICE]: 'icon-discount',
    15→  [KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.MARKETPLACE]: 'icon-shopping-bag',
    16→  [KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.FUEL_VOUCHER]: 'icon-supply',
    17→  [KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.MONTHLY_DISCOUNT]: 'icon-debit-account',
    18→  [KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.CAR_INSURANCE_DISCOUNT]: 'icon-protect-car',
    19→  [KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.PARKING_DISCOUNT]: 'icon-toll-gate',
    20→  [KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.FINES_DISCOUNT]: 'icon-attach',
    21→  [KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.IPVA_DISCOUNT]: 'icon-vehicle',
    22→  [KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.AIRLINE_MILES]: 'icon-airplane',
    23→};
    24→
    25→const NAME_TO_KEY: Record<string, string> = {
    26→  'resgate de cashback em fatura': KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.RESCUE_IN_INVOICE,
    27→  marketplace: KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.MARKETPLACE,
    28→  'voucher para abastecimento': KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.FUEL_VOUCHER,
    29→  'desconto na mensalidade': KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.MONTHLY_DISCOUNT,
    30→  'desconto seguro auto': KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.CAR_INSURANCE_DISCOUNT,
    31→  'desconto em estacionamento': KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.PARKING_DISCOUNT,
    32→  'desconto em multas e debitos': KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.FINES_DISCOUNT,
    33→  'desconto ipva': KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.IPVA_DISCOUNT,
    34→  'milhas aereas': KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.AIRLINE_MILES,
    35→};
    36→
    37→export const getNormalizedKeyName = (name: string): string => {
    38→  switch (NAME_TO_KEY[name]) {
    39→    case 'resgate de cashback em fatura':
    40→      return 'cashback na fatura';
    41→    case 'marketplace':
    42→      return 'marketplace';
    43→    case 'voucher para abastecimento':
    44→      return 'voucher para abastecimento';
    45→    case 'desconto na mensalidade':
    46→      return 'desconto na mensalidade';
    47→    case 'desconto seguro auto':
    48→      return 'desconto seguro auto';
    49→    case 'desconto em estacionamento':
    50→      return 'desconto em estacionamento';
    51→    case 'desconto em multas e débitos':
    52→      return 'desconto em multas e debitos';
    53→    case 'desconto IPVA':
    54→      return 'desconto ipva';
    55→    case 'milhas aereas':
    56→      return 'milhas aereas';
    57→    default:
    58→      return '';
    59→  }
    60→};
    61→
    62→const POINTS_OPTIONS = [
    63→  { name: 'Resgate de cashback em fatura' },
    64→  { name: 'Marketplace' },
    65→  { name: 'Voucher para abastecimento' },
    66→  { name: 'Desconto na mensalidade' },
    67→  { name: 'Desconto seguro auto' },
    68→  { name: 'Desconto em estacionamento' },
    69→  { name: 'Desconto em multas e débitos' },
    70→  { name: 'Desconto IPVA' },
    71→  { name: 'Milhas aéreas' },
    72→];
    73→

toolUseResult.oldString:
import { FC } from 'react';
import { Dimensions } from 'react-native';
toolUseResult.newString: import { FC } from 'react';
toolUseResult.originalFile:
import {
  Box,
  Text,
  ListTextIcon,
  Button,
  Icon,
  BackDropBottom,
  Alert,
  Loading,
  SeparatorHorizontal,
} from '@semparar/design-system-app';
import { FC } from 'react';
import { Dimensions } from 'react-native';

import BasicScreen from '../../atomic/templates/BasicScreen';
import { InvoiceCashbackViewProps } from './models';
import React from 'react';

const InvoiceCashbackSummaryView: FC<InvoiceCashbackViewProps> = ({
  handleGoBack,
  onConfirmRescue,
  onExitResult,
  isRescueLoading,
  isRescueConcluded,
  isRescueFailed,
  items,
  effectiveShowResult,
  onOpenDefault,
  modalizeRef1,
  formattedSelectedPoints,
  formattedSelectedReais,
  screenTitle,
  height,
}) => {
  return (
    <BasicScreen
      hasScroll
      hasHeader
      bgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_03"
      leftIconOnPress={handleGoBack}
      title={screenTitle}
      hasRightIcon={!effectiveShowResult}
      rightIcon="icon-help"
      rightIconOnPress={onOpenDefault}
      errorButtonOnPress={() => {}}
      isLoading={false}
    >
      {!effectiveShowResult ? (
        <>
          <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller" flex={1} justify="flex-start">
            <Text
              color="INTENSE_COLOR_05"
              testID="invoice-cashback-main-title"
              type="headingMDL"
              mt="smaller"
              mb="small"
            >
              Revise as informações para confirmar o cashback
            </Text>

            <Text
              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              type="paragraphMDM"
              colorBold="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              mb="nano"
            >
              Valor em pontos
            </Text>

            <Text
              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              type="paragraphL"
              colorBold="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              mt="nano"
              mb="xxs"
            >
              {formattedSelectedPoints}
            </Text>

            <SeparatorHorizontal
              mb="xxs"
              bgColor='BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02'
              height={1}
              width="100%"
            />

            <Text
              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              type="paragraphMDM"
              colorBold="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              mb="nano"
            >
              Valor em reais
            </Text>

            <Text
              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              type="paragraphL"
              colorBold="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              mt="nano"
              mb="xxs"
            >
              {formattedSelectedReais}
            </Text>

            <SeparatorHorizontal
              mb="xxs"
              bgColor='BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02'
              height={1}
              width="100%"
            />

            <Text
              align="left"
              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              type="paragraphMDM"
              colorBold="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              mb="nano"
            >
              Cashback em
            </Text>

            <Text
              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              type="paragraphL"
              colorBold="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              mt="nano"
              mb="xxs"
            >
              Até 72h
            </Text>

            <Alert
              label="O valor é aplicado e exibido nos lançamentos da sua fatura aberta."
              type="info"
              icon="icon-calendar"
            />
          </Box>

          <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller">
            <Button
              text="Confirmar desconto"
              mt="large"
              mb="small"
              onPress={onConfirmRescue}
              disabled={!!isRescueLoading}
              testID="invoice-cashback-button"
            />

            <Loading title="Aguarde..." visible={!!isRescueLoading} />
          </Box>
        </>
      ) : (
        <>
          {isRescueConcluded && !isRescueFailed && (
            <>
              <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller" flex={1} justify="center" align="center">
                <Box
                  bgColor="PLUS_COLOR_03"
                  borderColor="PLUS_COLOR_01"
                  borderRadiusBottomLeft="medium"
                  pd="innerMedium"
                  borderRadiusBottomRight="medium"
                  borderRadiusTopRight="medium"
                  borderRadiusTopLeft="medium"
                  borderBottomWidth="small"
                  borderTopWidth="small"
                  borderLeftWidth="small"
                  borderRightWidth="small"
                  mb="small"
                >
                  <Icon name="icon-check" color="PLUS_COLOR_01" size="sm" />
                </Box>

                <Text type="subtitleXXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="small">Cashback aplicado</Text>

                <Text align="center" type="paragraphLG" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03" mb="small">O valor será aplicado em até 72h na sua fatura aberta.</Text>
              </Box>

              <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller">
                <Button
                  text="Ir para o início"
                  mt="large"
                  mb="small"
                  onPress={onExitResult}
                  testID="invoice-cashback-result-success-button"
                />
              </Box>
            </>
          )}
          {!isRescueConcluded && isRescueFailed && (
            <>
              <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller" flex={1} justify="center" align="center">
                <Box
                  bgColor="DENY_COLOR_03"
                  borderColor="DENY_COLOR_01"
                  borderRadiusBottomLeft="medium"
                  pd="innerMedium"
                  borderRadiusBottomRight="medium"
                  borderRadiusTopRight="medium"
                  borderRadiusTopLeft="medium"
                  borderBottomWidth="small"
                  borderTopWidth="small"
                  borderLeftWidth="small"
                  borderRightWidth="small"
                  mb="small"
                >
                  <Icon name="icon-circle-alert" color="DENY_COLOR_01" size="sm" />
                </Box>

                <Text type="subtitleXXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="small">Algo deu errado!</Text>

                <Text type="paragraphLG" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03" mb="small">Por favor, tente mais tarde.</Text>
              </Box>

              <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller">
                <Button
                  text="Voltar"
                  mt="large"
                  mb="small"
                  onPress={onExitResult}
                  testID="invoice-cashback-result-failed-button"
                />
              </Box>
            </>
          )}
        </>
      )}

      <BackDropBottom modalHeight={height * 0.53} modalizeRef={modalizeRef1}>
        <Text type="subtitleXXL" mb="smaller" mt="smaller" align="center">
          Use seus pontos para pagar menos na fatura
        </Text>

        <ListTextIcon items={items} ml="nano" mr="nano" type="list" mb="smaller" />

        <Button text="Entendi" onPress={() => modalizeRef1.current?.close()} />
      </BackDropBottom>
    </BasicScreen>
  );
};

export default InvoiceCashbackSummaryView;
